Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}That uniform... You must be a student at Gekkoukan High. That's nice. Do you live in this dorm?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}It looks like Gekkoukan High went through a rough patch a while back, but it's been rebuilt into such a magnificent building...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}...Oh, never mind me. Enjoy your new school semester this spring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 703}I hear that there's a weird disease going around, so take care of yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
